title: Technical Title
generation_instructions: Provide a technical title for the project that is understandable by a professional scientific audience. The title should be concise and capture the essence of the research in technical terms. Adhere to the character limit of 150 characters.
search_queries: how to write technical title for research grant
examples of technical titles for Alzheimer's research
best practices for writing a technical summary

title: Non-Technical Title
generation_instructions: Provide a non-technical title for the project that is easily understandable by a general audience. The title should be concise and capture the essence of the research in lay language. Adhere to the character limit of 75 characters.
search_queries: how to write non-technical title for research grant
examples of non-technical titles for Alzheimer's research
lay language explanation of Alzheimer's disease research
best practices for writing a non-technical summary

title: Keywords
generation_instructions: List 6-10 comma-separated keywords or phrases that accurately reflect the research proposal's focus, excluding keywords selected from the CADRO list. These keywords will be used for indexing and searching the proposal.

title: Non-technical Summary
generation_instructions: Provide a concise non-technical summary of the proposed research that is accessible to a general audience. Explain the project's goals, methods, and potential impact in lay terms. This summary will be used for public educational purposes if the proposal is funded. Limit the response to 600 characters including spaces.
search_queries: examples of lay summaries for medical research
alzheimer's disease explained for general audience

title: Technical Abstract
generation_instructions: Write a technical abstract summarizing the research project's objectives, methods, expected results, and significance. This abstract is considered confidential and will only be used for administration and peer review purposes. Limit the response to 2400 characters including spaces.
search_queries: examples of research abstracts for Alzheimer's disease

title: Specific Aims and Benchmark Accomplishments
generation_instructions: State the objectives and hypotheses to be tested in the research project. Describe concisely and realistically what the specific research described in this application is intended to accomplish. Include milestone or benchmark accomplishments that will be used to assess progress. Limit the response to 4200 characters including spaces.

title: Relevance to Alzheimer's disease
generation_instructions: State briefly and concisely how the proposed research is relevant to determining the causes of or possible treatment or cure for Alzheimer's disease or related dementia. Limit the response to 1200 characters including spaces.

title: Innovative Aspects
generation_instructions: Describe the innovation behind the hypothesis, approach, or methodology. Limit the response to 750 characters including spaces.

title: Future Plans
generation_instructions: Assuming that the research aims are successful, describe the general administrative and experimental plan for advancing this line of inquiry to a point of relevance to sufferers of this disease. Limit the response to 1500 characters including spaces.

title: Research Plan
generation_instructions: Develop a comprehensive research plan that includes: a clear description of the research design, detailed methods for data collection and analysis, a well-defined experimental plan, and specific milestones to assess progress. Ensure the plan is feasible and addresses potential challenges. Adhere to the specified word count limitations for Research Plan Sections A-C (3500 words).
search_queries: data analysis techniques for biological research

title: FACILITIES AND ENVIRONMENT
generation_instructions: Briefly document the suitability of the available research facilities and academic environment for the execution of the proposed research. Do not list facilities that are irrelevant to the proposed research. Exceptional resources should be noted, but more common resources should be omitted or summarized generically. Limit the response to 5000 characters including spaces.
